channel.title: Truth to Behold on the KING's Scribe, 7
channel.description: Recent content in Truth to Behold on the KING's Scribe, 7

item.title: Voice-Activated
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Exodus 19v5-6 | Becoming His people.

Activate the Covenant.

item.title: I Wait
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Isaiah 26v8 | My contemplation: you, YHVH.

delight of my soul, “YHVH”

item.title: Lordship
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Authority & Power, to save. | Isaiah 1v1-2

Now, I see: medallion, crest and cape.

item.title: Live and Teach
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Ezra 7v10 | Thrive by Light. Only then, can you teach it.

Behold. Obey. Instruct.

item.title: Every Word
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Matthew 4v4 | True Food.

Flourish. I will not merely exist.

item.title: Trade Him for Them
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
All of Christ for all I was. | John 3v16

what manner of Love?

item.title: Everlasting Life
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
John 17v3 + Ephesians 1.

evrlasting riches, maaan!!!

item.title: Ask. Seek. Knock
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Matthew 7v7

every persistent one

item.title: Cognition
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Matthew 16v16 | Do you recognise a Son?

I know Him…

item.title: I'm Commanded
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Matthew 8v8 | Secret of true Authority

Submission to Authority = commensurate Authority

item.title: Move, Mountain!
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Mark 11v23 | 'Mountain, begone!'

True Faith Says

item.title: Sanctify
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
John 17v17 | Sanctify us.

Wash us in Thine Word, and set us apart.

item.title: Eternal Life
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
John 17v3 | What is eternal life?

Eternal Life: experienced and known, in UNION with God.

item.title: Full Knowledge
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Faith to Complete Experience of TRUTH | Titus 1v1.

Writing. A purpose defined.

item.title: Tender Love
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Philippians 1v8 | Heart of Jesus, heart of mine.

How greatly & deeply I care for you

item.title: Because Ye Ask Not
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
James 4.

Ask aright.

item.title: Abide in His Love
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Jude 1v20-12 (+) Luke 6v47-49

Take care!
Many have misunderstood this script, and read it out of context…

item.title: No Longer I
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Galatians 2v20.

New UNION Life

item.title: Wealth and Wisdom

2 Corinthians 9v8.

This, I am!

item.title: This Wealth

2 Corinthians 8v9.

do you… KNOW that Grace?

item.title: Always Triumphant
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
2 Corinthians 2v14

always…

item.title: Where to Rest
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Drawn from Hebrews 11v11. YHVH-FAITH be mine.

Repose in HIM, my soul.

item.title: Full Spectrum
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Philippians 1v10 | Oh, the fullness of Christ in men.

My discernment, made perfect.

item.title: Walk Perfect
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Philippians 1v9 | A prayer to know Him and walk truly.

O! that my love would…

item.title: Pure Center
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
1 Peter 1v22 | Empowered unto Philadelphia.

that we may love one another, from a pure center

item.title: The Abiding
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
1 John 2v17 | Who but the abiding man can do God's will?

Abide in CHRIST, find ye rest.

item.title: Promise Keeper
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Hebrews 11v11 | His word won't fail. Faithful and True, is YHVH.

Faith governs Creation.

item.title: Dead Works
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Hebrews 9:14 | the cleansing blood and heart of man.

True life is lived only from a heart, clean.

item.title: A Cure
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
A cure for dryness of soul, lethargy, fainting.

screenshot of my foray into the light…
Source: The Secret Place - Dr. Dale A. Fife

item.title: Mercy
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
just mercy.

our cry:

item.title: Still Waters
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
See the 23rd Psalm.

YHVH, my shepherd

item.title: Bene Elohim
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Son of Creator-GOD

He is my Father

item.title: Erujeje
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Mighty and Fearful One.

Wonderful to behold!

item.title: Sardis
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Redeemed. Transformed.

7 lamps; 7 churches

item.title: Word Lamp
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Psalms 119v105 | we can walk on a brightly illuminated path.

Your Word. Give me more!

item.title: YHVH's Delight
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Psalms 35v27 | Say continually, be magnified, o YHVH.

Shout, Rejoice, Declare

item.title: Hear & Understand
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Enoch 37v1.

from the beginning

item.title: He Is Rocky
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Psalm 18v2 | My Rock, My Strength.

My Rock - whereon I’ll raise my house.

item.title: Governing Light
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Revelation 21v23 + Genesis 1v14-18

The GLORY of GOD is my LIGHT.

item.title: Jesus Conscious
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Hebrews 12v2 + Luke 10v39

this one thing, attend 👇🏾

item.title: Right to Rule
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Psalm 22v22 | Here's your key, Sir.

Come of age, get your key…

item.title: Only Believe
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Abba's counsel.

Live by Faith

item.title: Human Torch
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Transfiguration | Inner realm, shine forth.

YHVH’s Throne? It’s in me.

item.title: Manifest Sons
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Man. Temple. City. Rock.

on-high, beyond beyond.

item.title: Union with Christ
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Soul undergoing transformation unto the divine.

We are one.

item.title: Creed 777
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Words to live by.

shine through me

item.title: Feed but Starve
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
set a table before me...

life for body & soul

item.title: Enemy
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
This type of mind...

Purge me, word of GOD

item.title: Unto D
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Unto Discernment

Set me apart.

item.title: Kingsman
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Watchman appointed by the Crown.

Do you wear this badge?
We’ve got the perimeter covered, LORD.

item.title: By Hearing
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
stay within reach of every proceeding word.

Faith comes… on a bike? On the wind?
Nay. In the Voice of our GOD.

item.title: Until the Day
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Matthew 24v38

sound the alarm, “Get in the ark, ya’ll!”

item.title: Imagine and Pray
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Yeshua, our big brother, teaches the mystery in functional praying.

Be convinced before you pray 🛒
Pray from experiential satisfatcion 🗝️

Jesus says to me, “Tayo, have Faith in GOD!
He didn’t say, “have Faith for Deliverance or for Provision!”

then,
He Guarantees this truth by HIS WORD:

This is what will be done for you, Daniel Tayo -
the one whose conviction does not yield, but believes what he Says will happen.

You can say to this nation,
“Be converted and be consumed with fiery love for Jesus”
and it will be done for you!

That’s why I have told you to BE CONVINCED before you pray,
that you receive whatever you pray for,
the moment you ask for it.

For only when we believe that we’ve received our request(s), shall we have it.

Experience GOD’S Loving Provision (in your) Imagination before you pray.

I heard Bro. Hagin would spend days preparing his heart through meditation, before he ever made a prayer-request.

item.title: What Light?
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
SHIFT: my light source...

The LIGHT of my dreams.
The LIGHT of my life.

item.title: God Love Light
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
God is love.

My heart sings, “what a beaufitul name it is, …”

item.title: Cry Out
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
I need your mouth; your voice; in the earth.

“Sing Out” by Ron Kenoly, plays now, in my ❤️

item.title: Fat Soul
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Nourish the Soul.

Epignosis - Truth experienced

item.title: Purpose, Planned
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
the Purpose (+) the Plan

His own plans; His own purpose

item.title: God's Plans
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
God's Plans, coming through.

Got this from Brother Hagin’s “Plans, Purposes and Pursuits.”

item.title: State of the Union
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Abide in intimacy => FRUIT

Take no praise, branches heavy-laden: but continue in the Vine.

item.title: Love Dare
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Such passionate ardour can be scary: but, dare to take it...

Love me gently, Dear CHRIST Jesus

item.title: Adventurer
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Imagination Explorer: Messiahana Stones. Discovering New Frontiers.

Gulf no longer, betwixt Thine thoughts and mine, Abba.

item.title: In His Name
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
we signin' cheques...

A signet that says Son; Righteous One

item.title: Let Him Say
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
I'll say, till I see. Then, say for I see.

What better filling?

item.title: REST
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Faithful | Have you known REST?

Faith, full-grown.

item.title: Balloon Protocol
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Till my Heart See; that Faith doth build.

Lift off by flame-charged breath

Developing the Faithful & True INNER IMAGE

  • I must process (excogitate & pray) the promises of GOD until the eyes of my heart SEE!
  • A fast: 7 days
  • A search: for every scripture concerning {whatever you lack, e.g Marital Joy, Peace, Salvation for your family, The Power of GOD, etc.}
  • Meditation + Praying in the Spirit (that is, as the Spirit leads): for 7 full days

Get the Blueprint in your heart and Faith will build it!

item.title: Light Life
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Beatiful Truthse | Light. Life. Eternally.

Written Word of God, mystic word of faith.

item.title: Limited Mind
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Pray!

No mercy!

item.title: Is Love
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
God is Love

Every step, bathed in LIGHT.
LOVE singing, “la-la-la…”

item.title: Shepherd of my Heart
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Prayer for sherperding unto light and fruition.

Deeper still, dear Lord.

item.title: Stargazing
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Target Locked!

Target in sight. Detractors, away with ye!

item.title: I Believe
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
The GOD Father. The Good Father.

He walks at my pace.

item.title: No Weapon
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Isaiah 54v17 + 2 Corinthians 5v21

whip ’em!

item.title: Before You Call
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Intent, focused love. | Isaiah 65v24

before I call;
for You watch o’er me
